output: {"workflow_name": "Monthly Payroll Run", "category": "payroll", "trigger": {"event": "The monthly pay period closes", "source_system": "Workday"}, "systems": ["Workday", "Concur", "Google Workspace"], "steps": [{"step_id": 1, "action": "Aggregate timesheets and approved expenses", "system": "Workday", "required_inputs": ["pay_period", "employee_ids"], "condition": null, "fallback": "Flag missing timesheets to managers"}, {"step_id": 2, "action": "Calculate gross pay, taxes, and deductions", "system": "Workday", "required_inputs": ["pay_period", "tax_tables"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 3, "action": "Reconcile totals against the finance ledger", "system": "Concur", "required_inputs": ["pay_run_id", "gl_account"], "condition": "Block disbursement if variance exceeds threshold", "fallback": "Hold the run and notify finance"}, {"step_id": 4, "action": "Disburse payments and send payslips", "system": "Workday", "required_inputs": ["pay_run_id", "bank_file"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 5, "action": "Notify finance that the run is complete", "system": "Google Workspace", "required_inputs": ["pay_run_id"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}], "approval_required": true, "risk_level": "high"}

instruction: Convert the following business process description into a structured JSON workflow plan.
input: We need a workflow for parental leave. A field technician requests 3 days off, it goes to their manager, and once approved we adjust their balance and notify the team.
output: {"workflow_name": "Parental Leave Request", "category": "leave_management", "trigger": {"event": "A field technician requests parental leave", "source_system": "ADP"}, "systems": ["ADP", "Microsoft 365"], "steps": [{"step_id": 1, "action": "Submit parental leave request for review", "system": "ADP", "required_inputs": ["employee_id", "start_date", "end_date"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 2, "action": "Route request to direct manager for approval", "system": "ADP", "required_inputs": ["request_id", "manager_id"], "condition": null, "fallback": "Auto-escalate to skip-level after 3 business days"}, {"step_id": 3, "action": "Notify payroll and update leave balance", "system": "ADP", "required_inputs": ["request_id", "approved_days"], "condition": "Only after manager approval", "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 4, "action": "Inform the team of coverage dates", "system": "Microsoft 365", "required_inputs": ["team", "start_date", "end_date"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}], "approval_required": true, "risk_level": "high"}

instruction: Convert the following business process description into a structured JSON workflow plan.
input: When a new HR business partner joins Security at the remote-US team, we need to onboard them: collect their signed paperwork, set up their HR profile, provision their login and email, and add them to the right channels.

instruction: Convert the following business process description into a structured JSON workflow plan.

output: {"workflow_name": "Marketing Specialist Offboarding", "category": "offboarding", "trigger": {"event": "A marketing specialist is terminated or resigns", "source_system": "BambooHR"}, "systems": ["BambooHR", "Okta", "ServiceNow"], "steps": [{"step_id": 1, "action": "Record the termination and last working day", "system": "BambooHR", "required_inputs": ["employee_id", "last_day", "reason"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 2, "action": "Revoke all system access and SSO", "system": "Okta", "required_inputs": ["employee_id"], "condition": "On last working day", "fallback": "Page security if revocation fails"}, {"step_id": 3, "action": "Reclaim assets and close out tickets", "system": "ServiceNow", "required_inputs": ["employee_id", "asset_list"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}, {"step_id": 4, "action": "Run final payroll and benefits settlement", "system": "BambooHR", "required_inputs": ["employee_id", "final_pay"], "condition": null, "fallback": null}], "approval_required": true, "risk_level": "medium"}
